prompt.content: Use the 2024 financial data from Vale 2024 Financial Statements - IFRS page 10 to fill in in Vale's TEV / Revenue, TEV / EBITDA, TEV / EBIT, P/E, Debt / EBITDA in in "ResourceCo Comparable-Company-Analysis_vFF.xlsx", Tab: 'Comparable Company'. Net income will be the value from the Income Statement labeled "Net income from continuing operations attributable to Vale S.A.'s shareholders". Calculate EBITDA using the depreciation found at the cash flows reconciliation section in the file "Vale 2024 Financial Statements - IFRS.pdf". Assume cash and cash equivalents for cash and all interest-bearing debt and leases as debt. P/E should be calculated by dividing Market Capitalization by Net Income. Also, calculate and update the 75th Percentile for TEV / EBITDA and TEV / EBIT across all companies. All numbers should be in "multiples format" and rounded to one decimal place.
